rs4149056.description: SLCO1B1*5 (Val174Ala) — decreased transporter function, increased myopathy risk

phenotype_to_guidance.Normal Function: Standard simvastatin dosing appropriate. No increased myopathy risk from SLCO1B1 genotype.
phenotype_to_guidance.Intermediate Function: Increased risk of simvastatin-induced myopathy. CPIC recommends avoiding simvastatin doses >20 mg/day. Consider an alternative statin (e.g., pravastatin, rosuvastatin).
phenotype_to_guidance.Poor Function: High risk of simvastatin-induced myopathy. CPIC recommends avoiding simvastatin entirely. Use an alternative statin with lower myopathy risk (e.g., pravastatin, rosuvastatin).
